BLUERAY
“
Our focus is on reliability, punctuality, and safe cargo handling.

~ About Our Company ~

WE OFFER WORLDWIDE LOGISTICS
SUPPORT SINCE 2015

At Blue Ray Logistic, we provide professional and efficient cargo and logistics solutions from Malaysia to Sri Lanka and other international destinations. Whether you need to send personal packages, business shipments, or urgent air cargo, we deliver with care, speed, and accuracy.

Affordable Cost
On Time Delivery
Quality Logistics
Get Free Assessment: info@blueraygroup.com

~ Our Core Services ~

What We Offer

At BLUE RAY LOGISTIC & MARKETING SDN. BHD., we offer a wide range of logistics and supply chain services tailored to your business needs:

International Cargo Services

We ship from Malaysia to Sri Lanka and beyond.

International Cargo Services

We ship from Malaysia to Sri Lanka and beyond.

Air Cargo
Worldwide

Fast and reliable air freight to multiple countries.

Air Cargo
Worldwide

Fast and reliable air freight to multiple countries.

Business & Commercial Cargo

Tailored solutions for corporate and bulk cargo needs.

Business & Commercial Cargo

Tailored solutions for corporate and bulk cargo needs.

Door-to-Door Delivery

Convenient pickup and delivery at your location.

Door-to-Door Delivery

Convenient pickup and delivery at your location.

Customs
Clearance

We handle all customs procedures smoothly and professionally.

Customs
Clearance

We handle all customs procedures smoothly and professionally.

We are ready 24/7 to give you the services

~ Why Choose Us ~

OUR BEST FREIGHT
SERVICES

Our team ensures safe, timely, and cost-effective transport of goods, tailored to meet your business needs.

Fill your Details

    UPBGIFTDOOR TO DOOR

    ~ How It’s Work ~

    How It’s Work

    We receive your product, store it securely, hand it over for delivery, and ensure it reaches its destination safely and on time.

    STEP 01
    Received your product

    We receive your shipment at our facility with care and precision, verifying all items before processing.

    STEP 03
    Package has been handed over

    Your goods are securely stored in our modern, organized warehouse, ready for timely dispatch.

    STEP 02
    Warehousing

    The package is handed over to our trusted delivery partners, prepared for safe and efficient transit.

    STEP 04
    Package has been delivered

    Your shipment reaches its destination on time and in perfect condition — delivery confirmed.

    Vehicle
    Manufacturing
